infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TechConnect needs your location to find nearby mechanics and track your job.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: TechConnect needs your location to update your position for active jobs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TechConnect needs access to your photos to upload a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TechConnect needs camera access to take a profile photo.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: TechConnect needs your location to find nearby mechanics and track active jobs.

plugins.photosPermission: TechConnect needs photo access to upload a profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: TechConnect needs camera access to take a profile photo.
